done_payload.summary: Phase 1 complete. Implemented the tinylang lexer in `tinylang/lexer.py` with a `Token` dataclass (kind, value, line, col) and `tokenize(source: str) -> list[Token]` function. Handles all token kinds (NUMBER, STRING, IDENT, KEYWORD, PUNCT, EOF), multi-character punctuation (==, !=, <=, >=, &&, ||), string escapes, line/column tracking (1-based), whitespace/comment skipping, and proper error reporting with line/col for unrecognized characters and unterminated strings.

All 11 tests pass. The tinylang lexer implementation in tinylang/lexer.py correctly handles: empty input (EOF only), keyword vs identifier distinction, multi-character punctuation (==, !=, <=, >=, &&, ||), string escapes, comment stripping, line/column tracking, unknown character errors, integer and float numbers, and single EOF token emission.
